check.command: find /var/log/vmware/lookupsvc/ -xdev ! -name lookupsvc-init.log ! -name lookupsvc-prestart.log -type f -a '(' -perm -o+w -o -not -user lookupsvc -o -not -group lookupsvc ')' -exec ls -ld {} \;

candidate_check.description: The vCenter Lookup service logs folder permissions must be set correctly.

fix_text_excerpt:
At the command prompt, run the following commands:

# chmod o-w <file>
# chown lookupsvc:lookupsvc <file>

Note: Substitute <file> with the listed file.
title: The vCenter Lookup service logs folder permissions must be set correctly.
